HGSS.107.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Castle!\f
I am your guide to the Single and
Double Battle challenges.\f
Please be aware that these challenges
are designed for a single Trainer.\f
HGSS.107.0001:
Which challenge would you
like to take? [0200,0000]
HGSS.107.0002:
At the Battle Castle, you may take a
Single or Double Battle challenge.\f
Here, you are provided with Castle
Points (CP) that you must manage.\f
The CP are used for healing Pokémon,
renting items or Berries, and so on.\f
CP are earned by winning matches.
The amount varies by how you win.\f
The objective is to keep a winning
streak alive while managing your CP.\f
If you manage to win seven matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Please be aware of that!\f
HGSS.107.0003:
Welcome to the Battle Castle!\f
I am your guide to the Multi Battle
challenge.\f
Please be aware that this challenge
requires two Trainers.\f
HGSS.107.0004:
Would you like to take the Battle
Castle Multi Battle challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.107.0005:
You may team up with a friend for a
Multi Battle challenge.\f
Both Trainers are provided with Castle
Points (CP) that must be managed.\f
The CP is used for healing Pokémon,
renting items or Berries, and so on.\f
Trainers can use their CP on not only
their own Pokémon, but also their\r
partner’s.\f
Both Trainers earn CP by winning
matches.\f
The objective is to keep a winning
streak alive while managing your CP.\f
If you manage to win seven matches in
a row, you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
Please note: a Battle Castle Multi
Battle challenge can’t be interrupted.\f
HGSS.107.0006: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.107.0007:
Please select the Pokémon you wish
to enter.\f
HGSS.107.0008:
Excuse me!\f
You don’t have [0132,0000,0000] eligible Pokémon.\f
You must have [0132,0001,0000] different Pokémon
to enter.\f
HGSS.107.0009: Also, Eggs are ineligible to enter.\f
HGSS.107.0010:
Eggs and [0100,0001,0000] are not allowed
to enter.\f
HGSS.107.0011:
Eggs, [0100,0001,0000], and [0100,0002,0000]
are not allowed to enter.\f
HGSS.107.0028: Please come see me when you are ready.\f
HGSS.107.0029:
Both Trainers have chosen the
Pokémon [0100,0000,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
HGSS.107.0030:
Both Trainers have chosen the Pokémon
[0100,0000,0000] and [0100,0001,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
HGSS.107.0031:
You must save the game before I
show you in. Is that OK? [0200,0000]
HGSS.107.0033:
We’ve missed you!\f
You must save the game before you
resume your challenge. Please wait.
HGSS.107.0034:
Excuse me!\f
You didn’t save before you quit your
challenge last time.\f
Because of that, you have been
disqualified from your challenge!\f
HGSS.107.0035:
Congratulations!\f
In recognition of your victory, we
present you with a commemorative print!\f
HGSS.107.0036:
The Gold Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.107.0037:
The Silver Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.107.0043:
One Trainer should select
“BECOME LEADER.”\f
The other Trainer must select
“JOIN GROUP.” [0200,0000]
HGSS.107.0044:
We need to launch DS Wireless
Communications. [0200,0000]
HGSS.107.0045:
You must save the game before
I show you in. Please wait.
HGSS.107.0046:
Listen carefully!\f
If your Pokémon win without taking
damage, you earn more CP.\r
The more, the merrier!\r
Look at me. I don’t have much...
HGSS.107.0047:
Listen!\f
You can earn more Castle Points or CP
by facing higher-level opponents.\f
This is what they call high risk,
high return!
HGSS.107.0048:
Before every battle, you should check
the opponent’s lineup.\f
Don’t be cheap with your CP.
It’s like that old saying goes about\r
knowing your enemy.\f
“Unless you enter the enemy’s lair,
you cannot take their prize.”\f
...\r
That’s not the right old saying!
HGSS.107.0049:
Mr. Darach...\f
His feelings for Lady Caitlin are
all bottled up...\f
Oh, how I pine for him...
HGSS.107.0050:
At first, you can only use CP for
restoring HP.\f
But you can spend CP to rank up.
Then, you can even restore PP!
HGSS.107.0051:
If you lose, your entire stock of CP
is cleaned out to zero!\f
This is the rule at the Battle Castle.
HGSS.107.0052:
My dream is to wear a beautiful dress
and live in a castle!\f
That’s not what I meant to say...\f
My dream is to live in a castle with
someone who wears a beautiful dress!
